summary: Frontend E2E testing for Punjab Honda redesign. Exercised all critical flows via Playwright against public REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL: home/hero/slider dots, sticky header nav & CTAs, quick actions (incl. AMC modal), category strip, bike grid + tab filters, bike detail page with 3 CTAs and vehicle-prefilled enquiry submission (real POST succeeded), /service-booking form submit, /insurance form submit, /emi-calculator 3 sliders real-time update + quote modal, /contact form submit, /admin login (wrong token rejected, correct token logs in), KPIs + enquiries table + filter + status update + logout + localStorage clear, mobile hamburger menu, and footer. All flows pass.
critical_code_review_comments: Header.jsx: active-nav detection uses `loc.pathname + loc.search === item.to`, which only highlights the exact query-string match. For /bikes?category=motorcycle this works, but any extra params (e.g., utm_*) would break active highlighting. Minor.

AdminPage.jsx: token is persisted to localStorage before verify succeeds inside login(); if verifyAdmin throws a network error the token stays in state but not in LS - acceptable, but on mount the useEffect `if (token) verify(token)` with initial token from LS silently falls back to login form on failure without clearing `pwd`/showing a message. Minor UX.
AdminPage.jsx: status <select> fires updateStatus on every change then reloads full list - fine for small data, consider optimistic update for larger lists.
EnquiryModal.jsx: success state only resets on next `open` transition; if user closes the modal mid-submit the in-flight request still resolves and toggles success on a hidden modal. Edge case only.
EmiCalculator: slider step change works perfectly with keyboard/mouse; no issues.
App.js: single global EnquiryModal pattern is clean and correct; vehicle prefill verified via "For: <bike name>" rendering.
seed_data_creation: Submitted TEST_-prefixed enquiries during E2E (test_ride for first bike, service_booking, insurance, contact). Visible in /api/admin/enquiries and caused admin dashboard to show 15+ rows.
context_for_next_testing_agent: App is end-to-end functional. Key testids to reuse: site-header, nav-<kebab>-link, header-onroad-price-btn, header-test-ride-btn, category-<cat>, bike-tab-<cat>, bike-card-<slug>, bike-detail-test-ride/quote/enquiry, enquiry-modal/name-input/phone-input/submit-btn/close-btn/success-screen/done-btn, service-name/phone/branch/date/submit, ins-name/phone/submit, emi-amount/tenure/rate/result/quote-btn, contact-name/phone/message/submit, admin-login-form/token-input/login-btn/login-error, admin-stats/enquiries-table/filter-type/filter-status/row-<id>/status-<id>/refresh/logout, mobile-menu-toggle, mobile-nav-<kebab>-link, site-footer. Bike slugs are real (e.g., cb200x, activa-125) not the placeholder 'punjab-auto-upgrade' in the request text (that is the preview subdomain). EMI sliders use HTML range inputs - programmatic value-setting doesn't trigger React onChange; use keyboard arrows or mouse drag in future tests. Insurance and Contact pages unmount the form on success and render a thank-you section; check full body text, not form snippet.
